message:
fix(secret-scan): Reduce visible redacted token prefix/suffix to 2 chars

Decrease the number of visible characters in redacted tokens from 4 to 2
on each end. Previously, tokens were displayed as:

  abcd************wxyz

Now they appear as:

  ab**************yz

This provides better security for shorter tokens where 4 visible chars
at each end could reveal significant portions of the secret. With only
2 chars visible, even a 12-character token shows less than 35% of its
content, compared to over 65% with the previous 4-char visibility.

The [redacted] fallback for tokens <= 8 chars remains unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
